message:
refactor: clippy-driven cleanup across interactive, resources, and tools modules

Small targeted fixes from clippy lints and code review:

- commands.rs: remove unnecessary `let mut matches = matches` rebinding
  before a single pop() call — the binding was already consumed
- tests.rs: remove unused `RecvError` import (dead code after prior
  refactor of cancellation test)
- tree.rs: replace manual `count` variable with `.enumerate()` in
  build_tree_selector_rows truncation helper, removing two lines of
  boilerplate
- resources.rs: promote all_configured_resources_disabled() to const fn
  since it only reads bool fields with no runtime side effects
- tools.rs: replace closure `|l| l.is_empty()` with method reference
  `std::string::String::is_empty` per clippy::redundant_closure

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
